fn compute_running_sums(data: &[f64]) -> Vec<f64> {
    let mut sums = Vec::with_capacity(data.len());
    let mut total = 0.0;
    // GOOD: iterator avoids repeated bounds checks
    for &val in data {
        total += val;
        sums.push(total);
    }
    sums
}

fn find_local_maxima(data: &[i32]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    // GOOD: windows() avoids repeated indexing
    for (i, window) in data.windows(3).enumerate() {
        if window[1] > window[0] && window[1] > window[2] {
            result.push(i + 1);
        }
    }
    result
}
